targets.expr: count(count by (client_ip, user_agent) (count_over_time(version_version_request_invocation{user_agent=~"immich-server/.*"}[24h])) and on(user_agent) version_latest_version_count) / count(count by (client_ip) (count_over_time(version_version_request_invocation{user_agent=~"immich-server/.*"}[24h])))

count(count by (client_ip) (count_over_time(version_version_request_invocation{user_agent=~"immich-server/.*"}[24h]) or count_over_time(version_changelog_request_invocation{user_agent=~"immich-server/.*"}[24h])) unless count by (client_ip) (count_over_time(version_version_request_invocation{user_agent=~"immich-server/.*"}[30d] offset 24h) or count_over_time(version_changelog_request_invocation{user_agent=~"immich-server/.*"}[30d] offset 24h)))
